title: Battery Draining Quickly
description: Troubleshoot fast battery drain on laptops.

steps.instruction: Click the battery icon in the taskbar. Set the Power Mode slider left towards 'Best battery life'.
Open Settings → System → Battery → Battery usage per app to see which background applications are using the most battery. Close unnecessary apps.
Lower your screen brightness to 50% or less to significantly extend battery life.
Turn off Bluetooth and Wi-Fi if not currently in use.
If the battery continues to drain exceptionally fast (e.g. going from 100% to 0% in an hour) even after a restart, please raise a hardware ticket for battery replacement.
